name: Peanut Butter & Chocolate Squares
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat oven to 325°F.
2 In a medium mixing bowl, combine peanut butter, sugar, flour and egg whites. Stir in 3/4 cup of the chopped walnuts.
3 Spread mixture in a lightly greased 9-by-13-inch pan.
4 Bake for 10 to 12 minutes or until lightly browned along the edges.
5 Meanwhile, break chocolate into 1 to 2 inch pieces.
6 Remove cookies from oven. Immediately place chocolate on top of cookies.
7 Return to oven and cook for 1 minute more.
8 Remove from oven; spread melted chocolate over tops of the cookies.
9 Sprinkle with the remaining chopped walnuts.
10 Cut into squares while warm.
